meta.description: Triggered by GHL workflow when AI Tier = Hot. Sends personalised WhatsApp message via Meta Cloud API, tags GHL contact as whatsapp-sent. Replace YOUR_PHONE_NUMBER_ID, YOUR_WHATSAPP_API_TOKEN, YOUR_GHL_API_KEY before importing. GHL webhook URL: https://n8n.zainsverse.de/webhook/ghl-hot-lead-whatsapp
